news_items.headline: Stephen A: The Mets are a 'national disgrace'
news_items.description: Stephen A. Smith discusses the Mets' 12-game losing streak and says Carlos Mendoza should be fired.

news_items.headline: Royals, Hallmark unveil ballpark plan for downtown Kansas City
news_items.description: The Royals and Hallmark Cards announced they are teaming up to build a new ballpark in downtown Kansas City that would surround mixed-use development.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Team hitting ratings
news_items.description: Stay ahead of the game and optimize your fantasy baseball hitters with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's hitting matchups as well as the potential for stolen bases.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Pitcher projections for the next 10 days
news_items.description: Keep up to date on who is pitching -- and how well they're expected to do -- with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's probable starting pitchers with game score projections.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball do-over? Which players' ADP have moved most since the preseason?
news_items.description: A deeper look at the players whose ADP has shifted most from the preseason to now.

news_items.headline: Inside the numbers on New York Mets' 12-game losing streak
news_items.description: Here's what has gone wrong for New York -- and whether it's already time to say goodbye to October.
